info.name: Hotel API - Review CRUD + Docs
info.description: Merged collection containing review CRUD requests and the Postman requests from docs branch.

request.description: Allowed tripType values: FAMILY, COUPLE, FRIENDS, BUSINESS, SOLO, OTHER
Allowed tag values: CLEAN, KIND, GOOD_LOCATION, QUIET, GOOD_VALUE, GOOD_VIEW, DELICIOUS_BREAKFAST, EASY_PARKING, UNCLEAN, NOISY, BAD_LOCATION, EXPENSIVE, UNKIND, INCONVENIENT
Allowed rating category values: CLEANLINESS, SERVICE, LOCATION, FACILITY, VALUE, COMFORT
